title: Implement language locales for landing page
description: Add locale files and wire text on the landing page to `next-intl` so content switches based on user locale.

title: Fix cross-origin request error when running dev server (allowedDevOrigins)
description: Investigate and add the proper `allowedDevOrigins` configuration to the dev server to resolve CORS errors during local development.

title: Add Slide 3 (Concept to Publication)
description:
Concept to Publication

Steps:
1) Input: Submit raw concepts to your dedicated workspace.
2) Optimize: AI refines content using EPIC frameworks and localized targeting.
3) Execute: Systema auto-publishes live via your private API endpoint.
